sections.paragraph:
Ἀντιόχεια, ας, ἡ [derived from Ἀντίοχος, a common name for kings in the Seleu-cid dynasty] of the numerous cities named Antioch, only two play a role in the NT

—1. Antioch (Syrian) on the Orontes River Ac 11:19 and oft.; Gal 2:11.

—2. Antioch (Pisidian) in the province of Galatia Ac 13:14; 2 Ti 3:11.
